goalText: Hunt 15 Deer with Tiger attacks before moves run out
note: Rules per KING_OF_JUNGLE_DESIGN_RULES.md — Zone I Starter Plains. Grid always 6x6, Zone I animals only, no blockers at Level 1, no automatic starting matches.
objectiveRule: Only Deer removed by Tiger food-chain attacks count as hunted; direct Deer matches scatter but do not advance the hunt counter.
animationRequirements: Candy-style swap pop and invalid-swipe shake
Tiger predator strike and prey-hit animations
Attack-line trails, particle bursts, cascade refill spawn animation
